purpose: Choose the lowest-scoring or least-recently-improved active game for each production epoch's bounded refinement-and-pruning slice.
selectionPolicy: Prefer the lowest complete weighted score.
Treat an unscored active game as needing baseline scoring before a scored game is selected.
Break ties by oldest lastImprovedAt, then stable game ID.
Do not select a game with overlapping live work.
